prompt: Animate this wellness landing page. It's a calm, nature-rooted brand — the motion should feel like breathing, not bouncing. Add scroll-triggered reveals for each section and a subtle parallax on the hero.

assertions.text: Output file is a duplicate, original 12-health-wellness.html is untouched
GSAP and ScrollTrigger CDN scripts are included
Motion personality is 'subtle' — durations bias toward base/slow (0.6-1.0s), not micro/fast
Easing uses entrance (power2.out) or transition (power2.inOut), NOT spring or elastic
Hero section has parallax effect (yPercent with scrub:true) gated to desktop only
Ritual cards have staggered scroll reveal animation
Product cards have staggered scroll reveal animation
Journal section has scroll-triggered entrance animation
gsap.matchMedia wraps all animation code with reduced-motion guard
autoAlpha used instead of bare opacity in animation calls
No layout-triggering properties animated (no width, height, top, left, margin)
Token comments present in animation values
